creator: bezzubov@gmail.com
text:
I found resolve as I think.
I had 2 pipes:
#1:
pipe tablearg log logamount 10000 ip from any to table(60) out
pipe tablearg log logamount 10001 ip from table(61) to any in

#2:
pipe with 128Kbit/s
and I have php script, which by cron every minute connect to mysql and put in pipe #2 IP which <0 balance
in billing.

I think that on any moment one IP may be in one and in the second pipe. And its crashed core by dummynet.
